hypothesis: A Verilator lint/report target can bypass the broken custom-Yosys/yosys-slang path and reach the first real reduced Ternip RTL blocker.

commands.note: The derivation intentionally materializes a report even when Verilator exits nonzero.

decision.next_gate: Add the BaseJump include directory containing bsg_defines.sv to the Verilator report target and rerun.
decision.do_not_do_next: Do not change Ternip RTL, reduced parameters, board wrapper, or DDR integration for this blocker.
